title: linaria angustissima
intro: Linaria angustissima, also known as narrow-leaved toadflax or butterfly flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Linaria angustissima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for its herbal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
